articles.title: Kraken lets traders use tokenized stocks as collateral for leveraged trades
articles.description: Eligible users can now use select tokenized stocks and ETFs as collateral for futures and margin trading without selling their holdings.

articles.title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
articles.description: The token hit its highest in over a month during thin July 4 trading, with XRP up 5% in 24 hours to lead gains among majors.

articles.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
articles.description: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves.

articles.title: Bitcoin experts split over plan to freeze Satoshi's 1.1 million bitcoin as quantum threat grows
articles.description: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao said Satoshi Nakamoto's bitcoin should be frozen before quantum computers can steal it. Not everyone agrees.

articles.title: Kalshi hits record June trading volume as World Cup fuels prediction markets
articles.description: DefiLlama data shows Kalshi posted a record month for trading volume as the expanded FIFA World Cup boosted prediction market activity.

articles.title: 韋伯望遠鏡直擊 10 倍速造星現場，超高解析度解密 M82 雪茄星系 1,650 萬顆恆星

articles.title: NASA 露西號直擊花生小行星唐納德約翰森，尋獲太陽系早期水證據
articles.description: 美國太空總署（NASA）的「露西號」（Lucy）探測器在探索主小行星帶時傳回重大科學進展。 最新觀測揭示，小行 […]

articles.title: Why bitcoin's disconnect from record-high stocks won't last
articles.description: Researchers at Schwab and Hashdex said AI has diverted capital from digital assets while bitcoin continues to follow a familiar post-halving recovery pattern.

articles.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
articles.description: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

articles.title: Trump's crypto token buyers are down $3.8 billion, blockchain data shows
articles.description: The TRUMP token is down 96% from its peak, and 85% of secondary market wallets for WLFI are underwater, reflecting a broader downturn in the sector.

articles.title: Europe led on crypto regulation. Now implementation must match ambition
EU moves to block retail investors from explosive boom of multibillion-dollar prediction markets
articles.description: The region's regulators emphasized that a product's actual function as a derivative matters more than its commercial name or labeling when assessing compliance.

articles.title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal
articles.description: Bitcoin price strength could "break" the entire downtrend if the reversal pattern completed, John Bollinger suggested in light of the BTC rebound.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: UK's bold new crypto rules promise to unlock global trading, but huge compliance hurdles still threaten the rollout
articles.description: The U.K. FCA's crypto framework has been praised for prioritizing global liquidity and institutional adoption, but the authorization process is expected to be daunting.

articles.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
articles.description: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

articles.description: 科學家首度結合高解析度 X 光掃描與人工智慧（AI）技術，成功將西元 79 年因維蘇威火山（Vesuvius） […]

articles.title: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin, reiterates $250,000 BTC prediction
articles.description: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin after blockchain analysts linked him to a wallet that transferred 1,000 BTC to Coinbase Prime.

articles.title: 最新研究破除川普警告：孕期服用乙醯胺酚，不會增加子女過動與自閉風險

articles.title: XRP climbs 8% as record holder losses signal better risk-reward for buyers
articles.description: The token's 30-day and 365-day MVRV, a measure of how far holders are underwater, sit near -45% and -47%, lows Santiment says XRP has never reached before. Some traders read stretched losses as a contrarian signal.
